info.title: Geopera Operations
info.description: Official API for the Geopera geospatial data platform.

post.summary: Invoke Archive Place
Invoke Tasking Place
Invoke Create And Dispatch
Invoke Processing Create
Invoke Billing Topup
Invoke Catalog Search Stream
Invoke Reports Generate
Invoke Clip Create From Item
Invoke Uploads Complete
Create an alert rule for the caller's organization.
Update an alert rule (org-scoped).
Delete an alert rule (org-scoped).
Mark an alert event acknowledged (org-scoped).
List the caller's organization's alert rules (org-scoped).
Get a single alert rule by id (org-scoped; 404 cross-org).
List the caller's organization's alert events (org-scoped, triggered_at desc).
Test-evaluate an alert rule against an item without persisting.
Apply a custom band-math formula to a COG (statistics JSON or rendered PNG).
Calculate a named spectral index (NDVI, NDWI, …) on a COG (stats JSON or PNG).
Run a registered analytics operation (zonal_stats / time_series / change_detection).
List all registered analytics operations + their input schemas (discovery).
Detailed capabilities of a single analytics operation.
List spectral indices (optionally filtered by category / sensor compatibility).
List supported sensors and their band mappings.
Detailed info about a single spectral index (+ compatible sensors).
Validate a band-math formula (syntax + required bands) without executing it.
Mint an organization API key (the secret is returned once).
List an organization's API keys (metadata only — never the secret).
Revoke an organization API key.
Delete an asset (file) from an item (item access required).
Create a custom band-math formula for the caller's organization (write scope).
Update a custom band-math formula (write scope; org-scoped).
Delete a custom band-math formula (write scope; templates are protected).
List the caller-org's custom band-math formulas (optional category/template filters).
Get a single custom band-math formula by id (org-scoped; cross-org → 404).
Compute storage-billing drift for one org (no run recorded).
Orgs awaiting free-tier approval (the operator review queue).
List reconciliation runs (newest first; filter by org / flagged).
Unresolved tracking-failure DLQ counts, grouped by storage_type + source.
Audit trail of all drift corrections applied (compliance + support).
Run reconciliation for one org + persist the result.
Run reconciliation for every org with a subscription or credit balance (cron).
Settle/register terminal processing jobs holding an unsettled reservation (cron).
Grant the signup + monthly free credits to every FREE org (idempotent; cron).
Approve an org for the free tier + grant its credits immediately (admin).
Revoke an org's free-tier approval (stops future grants; admin).
Surgical single-asset drift correction (audited ledger entry; admin).
Backfill ledger add-events for live assets with no ledger entry (admin).
Zero orphan negative-net ledger residue with compensating adds (admin).
Remove stale positive-net ledger entries for deleted assets (admin).
Replay up to N unresolved tracking_failures rows (cron).
Request approval for a large credit purchase.
Approve a credit purchase and charge the saved card (human approver only).
Reject a pending credit-purchase approval.
List the org's credit-purchase approvals (optionally by status).
Get one credit-purchase approval (org-scoped).
Configure automatic top-up (requires a default card when enabling).
List all available plans with their quota/feature limits (public catalog).
An org's billing status + current usage (org membership required).
List organizations pending deletion (system admin).
The org's enterprise invoices (grouped from settled orders).
The org's current credit balance.
The org's credit ledger (paged, optionally filtered by reason).
Run monthly billing for one org (manual; org admin).
Run monthly billing for every org needing a run (cron).
Purge data for organizations past their deletion date (cron, DESTRUCTIVE).
The org's unbilled enterprise post-pay liability (to put on a Xero invoice).
Record a manual Xero invoice and mark the org's committed enterprise orders billed (admin).
Start saving a card to the org (off-session) — returns the Airwallex client_secret + env.
Persist a saved card (Airwallex Payment Consent) for the org.
Make a saved payment method the org's default (used by off-session charges).
Detach (remove) a saved payment method from the org.
List the org's saved payment methods.
Read the org's auto-topup settings (enabled=false if unset).
List the org's Stripe invoices (never 500s — empty on a Stripe hiccup).
Search every data source covering the AOI in one query (merged, type-tagged).
Extract a 3D point cloud (lon/lat/elev/attribute) from a GEDI or ICESat-2 granule.
List catalog vendors + host⇄pricing-vendor identifiers.
Resolve + 307-redirect to a scene's quicklook (external host).
Resolve + 307-redirect to a scene's thumbnail (external host).
Sentinel-2 scene metadata (parsed id + live COG info + available visualizations).
Landsat scene metadata (parsed id fields + available visualizations).
List available Landsat visualizations.
NAIP item metadata from the Element84 STAC.
List available NAIP visualizations.
List on-disk sample-data providers (+ registered sensors).
List sample scenes for a provider (paged).
Sample scene metadata (sensor + on-disk STAC + bands + thumbnail).
Search a commercial-imagery host's catalog (STAC, price-enriched).
List every searchable data source + its collections (the dataset registry).
Render a public satellite XYZ tile (sentinel/landsat/naip/sample) — unbilled, unauthenticated.
List delivery-bucket clip areas.
List mosaic types for a clip area.
Capture-date metadata for a clip area.
List clip jobs for an organization.
Get a single clip job by id.
List downloadable clip files for a job.
Tile rendering params for a completed clip job.
Stream a clip file from GCS (egress-enforced).
Create + dispatch an area-bucket COG clip job.
Delete a clip job and its GCS files.
Render an XYZ tile from a COG (bands or band-math expression).
Render a Mapbox Terrain-RGB tile from a single-band elevation/depth COG.
Generate a JPEG thumbnail from the smallest COG overview.
Predefined spectral-index formula templates (bare-dict, keyed by index id).
Curated colormap groups for the frontend picker (bare-dict).
AOI-scoped percentile statistics for a COG — drives per-AOI colormap rescale.
Create an organizing collection within a project (editor/admin required).
Soft-delete a collection, unlinking its items (project admin required).
List a project's collections (with item counts).
Get a collection by id within a project.
Update a collection's metadata (editor/admin required).
List EULAs (paged), each enriched with the caller's org acceptance.
Get a single EULA enriched with the caller's org acceptance.
List an EULA's documents (paged), each enriched with the caller's org acceptance.
Get a single EULA document enriched with the caller's org acceptance.
Record an organization's acceptance of a EULA document (idempotent).
Deliver due/retryable webhook deliveries (cron drainer).
Create a webhook subscription for the caller's organization.
Update a webhook subscription (org-scoped).
Delete a webhook subscription (org-scoped).
Send a test event to a webhook subscription and return the delivery result.
List the caller's organization's webhook subscriptions (secret redacted).
Get a single webhook subscription (org-scoped; secret redacted).
List catalog collections (provider-compatible, paged).
Get a single catalog collection by name.
List catalog data products (provider-compatible, paged).
Get a single catalog data product by name.
List catalog providers (PRODUCER/HOST, paged).
Get a single catalog provider by name.
Rename the bands on an item's asset (project member access).
Create an item within a project (editor/admin on the project).
Soft-delete an item (admin/editor on the item's project required).
Auto-detect band names for an asset from its reflectance statistics.
Issue a signed, egress-tracked download URL for an item's asset.
Duplicate an item with its assets + viz profiles (admin/editor on the project).
List items approaching retention expiry (system-wide, for the notification cron).
Transition all past-expiry items to 'expired' (the hourly retention cron).
Fetch a single catalog item by id.
List a project's items (optionally filtered by collection).
List items in a collection (access via the collection's project).
List all assets (files) attached to an item.
Get the lineage tree (parents + children) for an item.
Get an item as a full STAC 1.0.0 Feature with embedded assets + links.
Search a project's items with STAC-compatible filters (project member access).
Search all items across the caller's organization (STAC-compatible).
Render a map tile for one of our catalog items (profile or direct-param).
TileJSON metadata for one of our catalog items.
Global expression statistics (p2/p98 rescale) from the smallest COG overview.
OGC WMTS 1.0.0 GetCapabilities XML for one of our items.
OGC WMTS GetTile (KVP) for one of our items.
Update an item's mutable metadata (editor/admin on its project).
Mark one of the caller's notifications as read.
Dismiss one of the caller's notifications (hide it from the list).
Mark all of the caller's unread notifications as read.
List the caller's notifications, newest first (user-scoped inbox).
Count the caller's unread, undismissed notifications (lightweight poll).
List an order's tasking groups (admin).
Preview the server-authoritative AOI price for a cart of archive captures.
Cancel an order (policy-gated), refunding/voiding its reservation.
Place order(s) from a FeatureCollection (archive reserves; tasking queues feasibility).
Price-preview an order without committing (provider-compatible).
Get a single order (org-scoped).
List the org's orders (filtered, paged, provider-compatible).
List the items + assets delivered for an order (STAC FeatureCollection).
Get the dynamic order-form schema for a data product (reference).
Predict whether a tasking order needs a feasibility study (per-feature).
Predicted satellite passes for a tasking AOI (manual-feasibility: empty).
Covered-vs-remainder coverage for a fulfilled/fulfilling tasking order.
Per-AOI delivered-vs-requested coverage for a tasking order (any status).
List the org's feasibility studies (+ their options, paged).
List the org's tasking quotations (paged).
Unified inbox of the org's pending tasking decisions (feasibility + quotation).
Preview the server-authoritative price for an AOI-priced tasking request.
List the tasking sensor catalog (ids, resolution, bands, pricing inputs).
List the caller organization's active tasking templates.
Save a reusable tasking acquisition template for the caller's organization.
Soft-delete a tasking template (org-scoped).
Accept a feasibility-study option (one-step priced accept reserves/post-pays).
Accept or reject a tasking quotation (accept reserves/post-pays).
Patch an order's tags (metadata only; provider merge-patch).
List the org's minimum commitments with server-computed burn-down + take-or-pay.
Monthly enterprise statement: all activity (commitment lines flagged) + burn-down + settlement reconciliation.
Create an organization and enroll the caller as its owner (self-serve onboarding).
Tile rendering info for any completed processing job (clip/bathy outputs).
Delete any processing job by id (org-scoped).
Dispatch an existing pending processing job to its registered worker.
Execute a process (reserve credits + dispatch a job).
List available processes (OGC process catalog, public).
Get one process description (public).
Validate process inputs (provider returns empty body on success).
Estimate the cost of running a process with the given inputs.
List the org's processing jobs (provider facade, org-scoped).
Get a processing job by id (provider facade, org-scoped).
List available processing job types (optionally by category).
List a project's processing jobs (project member access).
Get a processing job by id (org match + project access).
Register a completed job's outputs + settle its credit reservation.
Create a workspace in the caller's organization.
Permanently delete a workspace and all its data (project admin/owner).
Add a member to a workspace (project admin/owner).
Change a member's role in a workspace (project admin/owner).
Remove a member from a workspace (project admin/owner).
Update a workspace's metadata (project admin/owner).
Archive a workspace, hiding it from the default list (project admin/owner).
Create a password-protected share link for an item or collection.
Revoke a share link (editor/admin on the shared target's project).
Render a map tile for a publicly-shared item (sharer-billed).
TileJSON for a publicly-shared item (token + password).
Validate a share link (token + password) and return the shared target.
List STAC Collections owned by the caller's organization (provider-compatible).
Cross-collection STAC search (CQL2-JSON / bbox / intersects), org-scoped.
Start an upload session, reserving storage quota (editor/admin on the project).
Mint a signed URL for uploading a file into an upload session.
Update an upload session's progress.
Mark an upload session failed, releasing its storage reservation.
Usage stats for the current billing period (storage, tiles, credits, jobs).
Historical usage (tile requests + peak storage) for the past N months.
Recalculate an org's storage from actual stored assets (org admin).
Create a visualization profile for an item (editor/admin).
Update a visualization profile (editor/admin).
Delete a visualization profile (editor/admin).
Set a profile as the item's default (editor/admin).
List all visualization profiles for an item (ordered by sort_order, created_at).
Get a single visualization profile for an item.
The visualizations available for an item — RGB/index/elevation — backend-owned + resolved.

user_id.title: User Id
user_id.description: UUID of the user to add

CollectionCreateInput.title: CollectionCreateInput
CollectionCreateInput.description: CollectionCreate + the project it lives in.

CollectionResponse.title: CollectionResponse
CollectionResponse.description: Collection as returned from the API.

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Max deliveries to attempt this pass.

ExecuteRequest.title: ExecuteRequest
ExecuteRequest.description: Request to execute a registered analytics operation.

href.title: Href
href.description: HTTPS .h5 granule URL from the STAC item (Earthdata-hosted)

clip_polygon.title: Clip Polygon
clip_polygon.description: AOI GeoJSON Polygon/MultiPolygon — points are clipped to this exact shape, not just the bbox

ItemResponse.title: ItemResponse
ItemResponse.description: Item as returned from the API.

entity_type.title: Entity Type
entity_type.description: Root node type: item | order | processing_job | collection | project

ProfileResponse.title: ProfileResponse
ProfileResponse.description: Visualization profile as returned from the API.

base_url.title: Base Url
base_url.description: Base URL for STAC links (stac format only)

ProjectResponse.title: ProjectResponse
ProjectResponse.description: Project as returned from the API.

SearchInput.title: SearchInput
SearchInput.description: Subset of provider's `POST /assets/stac/search` body schema, plus base_url.

ShareLinkCreate.title: ShareLinkCreate
ShareLinkCreate.description: Input for creating a share link.

role.title: Role
role.description: New role: admin, editor, or viewer

UploadInitiate.title: UploadInitiate
UploadInitiate.description: Input for starting an upload session.

src__operations__stac__reads__Collection.title: CollectionsListInput
src__operations__stac__reads__Collection.description: org-scoped STAC collection listing; base_url builds the self/root/items links.

Problem.description: RFC 7807 problem detail object (also the codegen error model).

type.description: A URI reference identifying the problem type.
type.title: Type

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type.
title.title: Title

status.description: The HTTP status code generated for this occurrence.
status.title: Status

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence.
detail.title: Detail

Problem.title: Problem

bearerAuth.description: Supabase / realm JWT presented as 'Authorization: Bearer <jwt>'.

apiKeyBearer.description: A minted API key presented on the same 'Authorization: Bearer <key>' header as a JWT. Either credential type is accepted.

oauth2Token.description: OAuth2 token exchange against the realm token endpoint.

cronToken.name: Authorization
cronToken.description: Cron-job shared secret, sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <BILLING_CRON_TOKEN>'.
